---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Start PocketDex with `start.bat` / `start.sh`
2. Open the QR code on your phone
3. ...
4. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| OS (PC) | e.g. Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Node.js version | e.g. 20.11.0 (run `node -v`) |
| PocketDex version | e.g. v0.1.0 |
| Phone OS | e.g. iOS 17 / Android 14 |
| Phone browser | e.g. Safari / Chrome |
| Network | e.g. home WiFi / hotspot |

## Logs
Paste any relevant terminal output here (run with `DEBUG=pocketdex:* npm start` for verbose logs).

```
paste logs here
```

## Additional context
Screenshots, screen recordings, or any other info that might help.
